prestazioni: Replace the stock **TFG (Twin-Flat-Gate) turbochargers** with **Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285X Gen2 billet turbos** (85mm inducer, 106mm exducer) paired with **Koenigsegg-designed titanium-aluminide turbine wheels** for reduced inertia and 2.1 bar peak boost on **E85 fuel**, targeting **1,400+ hp** while retaining the **5.0L flat-plane crank V8 (engine code: KDD5.0)**'s 8,500 RPM redline. Custom **3D-printed Inconel 718 exhaust manifolds** with **equal-length 1.75" primary tubes** and **secondary merge collectors** to optimize spool and top-end flow.

Upgrade the **stock 9-speed Koenigsegg Light Speed Transmission (LST)** with **Xtrac P1227 sequential internals** (dog-ring engagement, 30ms shifts) and **AP Racing carbon-carbon twin-plate clutch** (300mm diameter, 2,500 Nm torque capacity) to handle the increased power. Implement **Motec C187 ECU** with **Koenigsegg-specific torque vectoring algorithms** and **launch control mapped to 6,500 RPM** for optimal acceleration without wheelspin.

Install **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** with **3-way adjustable damping** (compression, rebound, high-speed rebound) and **Koenigsegg-developed active ride height system** (adjustable from 80mm to 120mm in 0.1s via hydraulic actuators). Pair with **Brembo GT-R monobloc calipers** (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) clamping **420mm carbon-ceramic rotors** (ventilated with **radial cooling vanes**) and **Pagid RS29 brake pads** for fade-resistant stopping power from 300+ km/h.
estetica: Replace the stock carbon fiber body panels with **Koenigsegg Automotive’s "Ghost Carbon" weave** (visible carbon with **gold-tinted epoxy resin**) and **3D-printed titanium front splitter** (adjustable angle via **electric actuators**, generating 200kg downforce at 250 km/h). Install **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (modified for CC850 chassis) with **custom-machined aluminum fender flares** (reinforced with **carbon-Kevlar hybrid** for rigidity) and **dual-layer clear coat** (matte base, gloss top).

Swap the OEM LED headlights for **Osram Laser+ units** (1,200m range, adaptive cornering) housed in **CN-milled billet aluminum bezels** (anodized **Koenigsegg "Satin Silver"**). Add **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 forged wheels** (20" front, 21" rear, **3-piece construction**) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (265/30 R20 front, 345/25 R21 rear) and **Koenigsegg-branded titanium wheel nuts** (weight: 12g each).

Interior overhaul with **Recaro Pole Position carbon-Kevlar seats** (HANS-compatible, **4-way lumbar support**) upholstered in **Bridge of Weir leather** (stitching in **Koenigsegg "Neon Yellow"**) and **Alcantara suede headliner**. Install **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (flat-bottom, **suede grip**) with **integrated Motec C127 dash display** (custom **Koenigsegg-themed UI**) and **Schroth 6-point harnesses** (FIA 8862-2009 certified). Replace door cards with **carbon fiber panels** (honeycomb core) and **titanium door handles** (weight: 85g each).
